action_set_definitions.name: get_greenhouse_status
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current environmental state of the greenhouse, including soil moisture, humidity, temperature, and device statuses.

action_set_definitions.name: control_pump
action_set_definitions.description: Turns the irrigation pump on or off.

status.description: The target status for the pump.

action_set_definitions.name: control_ventilation
action_set_definitions.description: Opens or closes the greenhouse ventilation system to manage air humidity and temperature.

status.description: The target status for the vents.

action_set_definitions.name: wait_simulation_time
action_set_definitions.description: Advances the simulation time by a specific duration to allow environmental changes (like irrigation or evaporation) to take effect.

minutes.description: Number of minutes to advance the simulation.

state_description.soil_moisture_percentage: Current moisture level of the soil as a percentage (0-100).
state_description.air_temperature_celsius: Current air temperature inside the greenhouse in degrees Celsius.
state_description.air_humidity_percentage: Current relative air humidity inside the greenhouse (0-100).
state_description.light_intensity_lux: Current light intensity measured in lux.
state_description.tank_water_level_liters: Remaining water in the irrigation supply tank in liters.
state_description.pump_status: Operating state of the water pump (on/off).
state_description.vent_status: Status of the greenhouse ventilation system (open/closed).
state_description.grow_light_status: Status of the artificial grow lights (on/off).
state_description.simulated_timestamp: The current simulated time in ISO 8601 format to track environmental progression.
